alchemy_get_portfolio_tokens.description: Alchemy portfolio (tokens-by-wallet); requires ``AUREY_ALCHEMY_API_KEY`` or ``alchemy_api_secret_path`` in settings.

wallet_address.description: Wallet to list token balances for.
wallet_address.title: Wallet Address

alchemy_get_token_prices.description: Alchemy token spot prices; requires ``AUREY_ALCHEMY_API_KEY`` or ``alchemy_api_secret_path`` in settings.

token_addresses.description: ERC-20 contract addresses to quote (0x form).
token_addresses.title: Token Addresses

alchemy_get_token_prices.title: AlchemyTokenPricesArgs

alchemy_get_transfer_history.description: Alchemy transfer history via ``alchemy_getAssetTransfers``; requires ``AUREY_ALCHEMY_API_KEY`` or ``alchemy_api_secret_path``.

wallet_address.description: Wallet whose inbound/outbound transfers are listed.
wallet_address.title: Wallet Address

alchemy_get_transfer_history.title: AlchemyTransferHistoryArgs

compute_token_amount_from_usd.description: Map a USD sell notional to raw smallest units (Alchemy price + decimals or fixed 18 for gas ETH).

chain.description: Chain slug where the token and wallet live.
chain.title: Chain

sell_kind.description: Use ``native_eth`` when ``swap_prepare`` sells gas ETH (``from_asset`` «native ETH»); sizes ``from_amount_wei`` using wrapped-native USD as a proxy. Ignores ``token_address``.
sell_kind.title: Sell Kind

token_address.description: Sell ERC-20 contract (0x). Required when sell_kind is erc20.
token_address.title: Token Address

usd_notional.description: USD notional as decimal text (e.g. "5" or "12.34").
usd_notional.title: Usd Notional

wallet_address.description: Wallet for price API context and optional balance check.
wallet_address.title: Wallet Address

compute_token_amount_from_usd.title: ComputeTokenAmountFromUsdArgs

earn_get_vault.description: Fetch one Earn vault by chain + contract; use before ``earn_prepare_deposit`` to validate metadata.

chain_id.description: Numeric chain id for the vault.
chain_id.title: Chain Id

earn_get_vault.title: EarnGetVaultArgs

earn_list_chains.description: Discover LiFi Earn-supported chains (vault discovery); optional LiFi key via env or ``lifi_api_secret_path``.
earn_list_chains.title: EarnListChainsArgs

earn_list_protocols.description: List yield protocols exposed by LiFi Earn; use before filtering vaults.
earn_list_protocols.title: EarnListProtocolsArgs

earn_list_vaults.description: Paginated vault search on Earn (`https://earn.li.fi`); filter to Composer-capable vaults by default.

asset.description: Underlying asset filter: token address (0x) or symbol as accepted by Earn.
asset.title: Asset

chain.description: Chain slug (e.g. base, ethereum); optional global filter.
chain.title: Chain

chain_id.description: EVM chain id; optional alternative to ``chain``.
chain_id.title: Chain Id

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor from prior response.
cursor.title: Cursor

is_composer_supported.description: When true (default), only vaults that support LiFi Composer routes are returned.
is_composer_supported.title: Is Composer Supported

is_transactional.description: Restrict to vaults that allow on-chain deposits.
is_transactional.title: Is Transactional

earn_list_vaults.title: EarnListVaultsArgs

earn_portfolio_positions.description: LiFi Earn portfolio positions for a wallet across supported chains.

wallet_address.description: Wallet to list Earn positions for (0x).
wallet_address.title: Wallet Address

earn_portfolio_positions.title: EarnPortfolioPositionsArgs

earn_prepare_deposit.description: Prepare a LiFi Composer quote that deposits into an Earn vault (``toToken`` = vault share token).

from_address.description: Sender; must sign the prepared tx on ``from_chain``.
from_address.title: From Address

from_amount_wei.description: Sell amount in smallest token units (decimal string of digits, same as ``swap_prepare``).
from_amount_wei.title: From Amount Wei

from_asset.description: Sell token on ``from_chain`` (0x address or symbol accepted by LiFi ``fromToken``).
from_asset.title: From Asset

from_chain.description: Source chain slug where ``from_asset`` is spent.
from_chain.title: From Chain

order.description: LiFi route preference for the Composer deposit leg.
order.title: Order

to_address.description: Recipient of vault shares on the vault chain; defaults to ``from_address``.
to_address.title: To Address

vault_address.description: Vault contract on the vault chain (0x).
vault_address.title: Vault Address

vault_chain.description: Chain slug where the vault lives.
vault_chain.title: Vault Chain

vault_chain_id.description: Numeric chain id of the vault.
vault_chain_id.title: Vault Chain Id

earn_prepare_deposit.title: EarnPrepareDepositArgs

evm_get_erc20_balance.description: ERC-20 ``balanceOf`` via JSON-RPC; requires ``AUREY_ALCHEMY_API_KEY`` or ``alchemy_api_secret_path`` for RPC.
evm_get_erc20_balance.title: EvmGetErc20BalanceArgs

evm_get_erc20_decimals.description: Read token ``decimals()``; uses RPC from Alchemy-backed URL (env key or vault path) when configured.
evm_get_erc20_decimals.title: EvmGetErc20DecimalsArgs

evm_get_native_balance.description: Native balance via JSON-RPC; requires ``AUREY_ALCHEMY_API_KEY`` or ``alchemy_api_secret_path`` for RPC URL derivation.
evm_get_native_balance.title: EvmGetNativeBalanceArgs

evm_resolve_ens.description: Resolve ENS on Ethereum L1; uses RPC from settings-backed resolution path.

chain.description: Must be 'ethereum'. ENS forward resolution is only defined on L1 mainnet.
chain.title: Chain

name.description: ENS name such as nick.eth (trimmed and lower-cased by the tool).
name.title: Name

evm_resolve_ens.title: EvmResolveEnsArgs

chain.description: Which address to return: ethereum (EVM), solana, or all.
chain.title: Chain

get_hosted_wallet_addresses.title: GetHostedWalletAddressesArgs

lifi_get_status.description:
``GET /v1/status`` on ``runtime.lifi_base_url``.

Optional ``x-lifi-api-key`` from env or vault path in settings.

tx_hash.description: Sending-chain tx hash, destination tx hash, or LiFi step id.
tx_hash.title: Tx Hash

lifi_get_status.title: LiFiStatusInput

list_supported_tokens.description: List Aurey-supported allowlist tokens (curated + indexed; not discovered).

chain.description: Chain slug (e.g. polygon, base). Omit or leave empty to list all symbols with the chains where each is supported.
chain.title: Chain

list_supported_tokens.title: ListSupportedTokensArgs

UserQuestion.description: Single follow-up question for the user or host UI.
UserQuestion.title: UserQuestion

questions.description: Host-visible follow-up questions for missing wallet-operation fields (never for secrets or unrelated PII).
questions.title: Questions

resolve_known_address.description: Map a known ticker to a contract address (allowlist; no Alchemy call).
resolve_known_address.title: ResolveKnownAddressArgs

resolve_token_by_address.description: Verify and label an ERC-20 by contract address (on-chain + optional CoinGecko).
resolve_token_by_address.title: ResolveTokenByAddressArgs

resolve_token_by_name.description: Map a human-readable token name to contract metadata (allowlist; exact match).
resolve_token_by_name.title: ResolveTokenByNameArgs

swap_prepare.description:
LiFi swap quote (`GET /v1/quote`).

Optional LiFi key from env or ``lifi_api_secret_path``.

from_asset.description: Token contract (0x…) or symbol for LiFi ``fromToken``. Selling **native gas ETH**: use phrases like «native ETH» — Aurey maps this to LiFi native ``0x000…000``. Selling **already-wrapped** WETH: pass WETH ticker or its contract ``0x…`` — not rewritten to native. Do not use LiFi for WETH→WETH.
from_asset.title: From Asset

order.description: LiFi route preference; omit for LiFi default sorting.
order.title: Order

slippage.description: Max slippage as decimal (e.g. 0.005 = 0.5%%). Omit for LiFi default.
slippage.title: Slippage

to_asset.description: Token contract (0x…) or symbol as accepted by LiFi ``toToken``. Phrases like «native ETH» on the **to_chain** are rewritten to that chain's wrapped native (e.g. Base WETH) because LiFi requires an ERC-20 ``toToken``.
to_asset.title: To Asset

swap_prepare.title: SwapPrepareInput

tx_execute.description: Execute a prepared tx: simulate, policy, sign via 1Claw, broadcast.

envelope.description: Required. The exact `envelope` object from a successful `tx_prepare_*` or `tx_prepare_lifi_swap` call: `prepare_output['result']['envelope']`. You cannot call this tool with only `idempotency_key`.
envelope.title: Envelope

idempotency_key.description: Optional idempotency key for broadcast (never pass without `envelope`).
idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key

prepared_id.description: Preferred for LiFi swaps: short server-side prepared transaction id returned by `swap_prepare`, `earn_prepare_deposit`, or `tx_prepare_lifi_swap`. Avoids sending large calldata through the model.
prepared_id.title: Prepared Id

tx_execute.title: TxExecuteToolArgs

tx_prepare_erc20_approval.description: Prepare ERC-20 ``approve`` for DEX/spenders (e.g. before LiFi swaps).

amount_wei.description: Token amount in the contract's smallest units (not necessarily 1e18). Lookup token decimals: USDC on Base/Ethereum uses **6** — e.g. 0.01 USDC = **10_000**, 1 USDC = **1_000_000**. WETH uses 18. Do not scale USDC by 10**18.
amount_wei.title: Amount Wei

tx_prepare_erc20_approval.title: TxPrepareErc20ApprovalArgs

tx_prepare_erc20_transfer.description: Prepare ERC-20 transfer; RPC from Alchemy credentials (env or vault path) if configured.

amount_wei.description: Token amount in the contract's smallest units (not necessarily 1e18). Lookup token decimals: USDC on Base/Ethereum uses **6** — e.g. 0.01 USDC = **10_000**, 1 USDC = **1_000_000**. WETH uses 18. Do not scale USDC by 10**18.
amount_wei.title: Amount Wei

tx_prepare_erc20_transfer.title: TxPrepareErc20TransferArgs

LiFiAllowanceContext.description:
On-chain allowance snapshot for the LiFi route's sell token and approval spender.

Always populated when LiFi returns an ERC-20 ``fromToken`` and ``approvalAddress``, even if
``allowance`` is omitted because the wallet already had enough allowance at prepare time.

allowance_sufficient.description: True iff ``current_allowance_raw`` was read and is >= ``amount_raw``.
allowance_sufficient.title: Allowance Sufficient

amount_raw.description: LiFi route sell amount in raw units (same as ``allowance.amount_raw`` when set).
amount_raw.title: Amount Raw

current_allowance_raw.description: ``allowance(owner, spender)`` at prepare time when Alchemy read succeeded.
current_allowance_raw.title: Current Allowance Raw

LiFiAllowanceContext.title: LiFiAllowanceContext

tx_prepare_lifi_swap.description: Build executable swap wiring from ``swap_prepare``; prefers ``prepared_id`` so calldata stays server-side (1Claw signing after prepare).

allowance_context.description: Optional: ERC-20 allowance context from ``swap_prepare`` / ``earn_prepare_deposit`` (pass through verbatim).

chain.description: Chain slug for the LiFi step.
chain.title: Chain

from_address.description: EOA that will send the swap tx (0x).
from_address.title: From Address

prepared_id.description: Server-side prepared id returned by swap_prepare; preferred because it avoids sending large LiFi calldata through the model.
prepared_id.title: Prepared Id

route_id.description: Alternative when `prepared` is awkward for the caller: LiFi step id string.
route_id.title: Route Id

transaction_request.description: LiFi transactionRequest dict; pair with `route_id` if no `prepared`.
transaction_request.title: Transaction Request

tx_prepare_lifi_swap.title: TxPrepareLiFiInput

tx_prepare_native_transfer.description: Prepare native (ETH/Base ETH) transfer; signing uses wallet path from settings.
tx_prepare_native_transfer.title: TxPrepareNativeArgs
